title: audit/provenance.jsonl record
description: Per-artifact provenance — what model, prompt, rubric version, and evidence produced this score/recommendation/applied change. Required for auditability of LLM-driven outputs.

artifact_id.description: The ID that uniquely identifies the artifact within its kind. For scores: <surface_id>__pass<N>__scorer<X>. For recs: recommendation_id. For applied_change: <recommendation_id>__<commit_sha>.

model.description: Model identifier (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7', 'stub-1.0.0'). Required when LLM produced the artifact.

prompt_hash.description: SHA-256 of the FULL prompt sent to the model (system + user messages, including all material). Lets us verify prompt-level reproducibility.

rubric_version.description: Version of references/rubric/SCORING-RUBRIC.md at the time of artifact creation. Format: semver or git SHA.

scorer_subagent_id.description: Which scorer instance (e.g. 'A', 'B', 'tiebreaker'). Empty for non-scorer artifacts.

evidence_sources.description: Paths/locations cited as evidence (e.g. 'src/cli.rs:42-67', 'help.txt:101'). Empty if no evidence cited.

wall_time_ms.description: Wall-clock time the model spent producing this artifact, in milliseconds.

tool_calls.description: Tool calls the model made while producing this artifact (e.g. Bash invocations to inspect the target binary).

ts.description: When the artifact was produced (ISO-8601 UTC).

skill_version.description: Version of the agent-ergonomics skill at the time of generation.

notes.description: Free-form annotations (e.g. 'tiebreaker invoked due to spread > 200 on intent_inference').
